headline: Is Verisk Analytics, Inc. (VRSK) A Good Stock To Buy Now?
summary: Is VRSK a good stock to buy? We came across a bearish thesis on Verisk Analytics, Inc. on Valueinvestorsclub.com by deepgame. In this article, we will summarize the bears’ thesis on VRSK. Verisk Analytics, Inc.’s share was trading at $188.19 as of April 29th. VRSK’s trailing and forward P/E were 27.26 and 23.31 respectively according to Yahoo […]
